message:
fix: return safe fallback from useAuth instead of throwing when outside AuthProvider (#3311, #3313) (#3323)

When useAuth is called outside an AuthProvider (e.g. during error-boundary
recovery, stale chunk re-evaluation, or KeepAlive route transitions), the
hook previously threw "useAuth must be used within an AuthProvider". This
caused 41 runtime errors and 6 unhandled rejections on the /ai-ml page.

Replace the throw with a defensive fallback that returns isLoading: true
and safe no-op functions. Components receiving this fallback will render
a loading state until the provider tree re-mounts, instead of crashing.
A dev-only console.warn is emitted so the root cause is still visible
during local development.

Fixes #3311
Fixes #3313

Signed-off-by: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
Co-authored-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
